text:
F0800E_STF_BED_BATH_CD F0800E Staff Assessment: Bed Bath Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident prefers to receive a bed bath. -=Not assessed/no information
0=Not checked (No)
1=Checked (Yes)
^=Blank (skip pattern)
202 F0800F_STF_SPNG_BATH_CD F0800F_STF_SPNG_BATH_CD F0800F Staff Assessment: Sponge Bath Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident prefers to receive a sponge bath. -=Not assessed/no information
0=Not checked (No)
1=Checked
